title: Baidu shares jump 7% as AI chip arm Kunlunxin said to target $50 billion Hong Kong IPO
summary_full: Baidu's Hong Kong-listed shares rose over 6% amid reports that its AI chip unit Kunlunxin is targeting a $50 billion initial public offering in the city.
summary_public: Baidu's Hong Kong-listed shares rose over 6% amid reports that its AI chip unit Kunlunxin is targeting a $50 billion initial public offering in the city.
